Ntc Of Motion Compeling Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs SUSAN VON HERRMANN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Nos. SEVEN. In responding, a party is required to make a reasonable and good faith effort to obtain the information by inquiry to other natural persons or organizations. This response is not consistent with a good faith effort to obtain the information.
The motion is denied as to Nos. NINE as the question calls for confidential and privileged information.
The motion is granted as to Nos. 14 and 15. The responses are inadequate as they fail to describe anything Yuen told Susan von Herrmann. The objections are ordered stricken. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Further Response To Request For Admissions And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff SUSAN VON HERRMANN'S Motion To Compel Further Response To Request For Admissions is denied. The requests are ambiguous. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
